body.title: Establish "Synthetic Intelligence" as canonical term for Igor
body.text:
# D-igor-synthetic-intelligence-2026-05-11
**title:** Establish "Synthetic Intelligence" as canonical term for Igor
**date:** 2026-05-11
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-igor-synthetic-intelligence-term

## Decision narrative
"Synthetic Intelligence" is the canonical term for Igor — a purpose-built cognitive system with memory, habits, pe_chain, and structured cognition, as distinct from a conventional AI (general-purpose LLM). Multiple glossary/terminology nodes already exist in the palace and have drifted; T-igor-synthetic-intelligence-term will discover and merge them into a single canonical node, then add "Synthetic Intelligence" as the first consolidated entry. The merge step was added after initial filing (AMEND: Akien noted existing glossaries must not be duplicated).

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
